summary: Backend-only verification completed for restart/live-order hardening and reconciliation safety. lint/build passed; runtime regression, live execution hardening, worker timeout, and FAILED summary probes all passed using MOCKED exchange clients.

minor.issue: Return message always says 'Closed {openPositions.length} positions' even when some positions are skipped due to active SELL orders; operational summary can be misleading during incidents.

action_items: Adjust sellAllPositions summary to report actual executed SELL count vs skipped positions.
Keep these four probes as mandatory CI gates for restart recovery and duplicate-order prevention.
Optionally add a dedicated regression asserting repeated syncActiveOrders does not change position quantity when filled quantity is unchanged.
critical_code_review_comments: executionEngine.ts remains oversized (>700 lines) and mixes reconciliation, execution, and side-effects; split modules to reduce production regression blast radius.
syncLiveOrder source tagging is always 'getOrder' even in fallback paths, reducing observability for incident RCA.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data. Isolated DATA_DIR under /tmp used per probe run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Executed and passed: yarn lint && yarn build; TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=testtoken TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USER_IDS=1 DATA_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it7-live LOG_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it7-live/logs TEMP_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it7-live/tmp yarn tsx /app/tests/live_execution_hardening_probe.ts; TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=testtoken TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USER_IDS=1 DATA_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it7-reg LOG_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it7-reg/logs TEMP_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it7-reg/tmp yarn tsx /app/tests/runtime_backend_regression.ts; TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=testtoken TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USER_IDS=1 DATA_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it7-failed LOG_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it7-failed/logs TEMP_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it7-failed/tmp yarn tsx /app/tests/execution_summary_failed_probe.ts; TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=testtoken TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USER_IDS=1 DATA_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it7-timeout LOG_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it7-timeout/logs TEMP_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it7-timeout/tmp yarn tsx /app/tests/worker_timeout_probe.ts. MOCKED APIs: FakeLiveIndodaxClient/FakeLiveOrderApi/FakeIndodaxClient. Telegram live delivery not validated end-to-end.
rca of the issue: No blocking failure reproduced in this iteration. Duplicate submit/cancel/sell protections behaved deterministically in probes: hasActiveOrder guards prevented repeat BUY/SELL, and fill delta application stayed monotonic via deltaFilled=max(0,nextFilled-currentFilled). Minor RCA: sellAllPositions reporting uses initial open position count instead of actual successful closes, which can mislead operational reconciliation messages.
